response:
The living room LED output function is $L(t) = 200 - 200\sin\left(\frac{\pi}{12}t\right)$ for times when $0 \le L(t) \le 500$, otherwise $L(t)=0$.

The total energy consumption of the LEDs over a 24-hour period is 480 watt-hours.

Blank the bedroom requires solving $0.3r + 0.6g + 0.1b = 500$ with $0 \le r,g,b \le 255$.

Blank all valid combinations form a plane segment within the defined cube.

Blank no two adjacent words start with consecutive letters in this text.

Blank the first word of each sentence is the word blank.
